title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 535.140 - Service shall stand instead of demand
text:
535.140.  Service shall stand instead of demand. — Service of the complaint and summons in such action shall be a sufficient demand of the rent in arrear, and of a reentry on the demised premises.
(RSMo 1939 § 2981, A.L. 1997 H.B. 361) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2594; 1919 § 6888; 1909 § 7891
